def positive_pydantic_settings_model_does_not_forbid_extra_fields():
    rule_id = "pydantic_settings_model_does_not_forbid_extra_fields"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Pydantic Settings model does not set model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid'), allowing silent typos."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
